============================== 诊断性消融研究脚本 (带日志) ==============================

              Accuracy Macro Precision Macro Recall Macro F1-Score
Baseline         97.20           95.09        94.95          94.98
w/o Visual       97.20           95.09        94.95          94.98
w/o Syntactic    97.20           95.09        94.95          94.98
